name: io.github.SunrisesIllNeverSee/fundscore
description: Lighthouse for repos — deterministic investor-readiness scoring (0-100) via MCP. 3 tools: score_repo (score a repo), get_fix_plan (scaffold plan for missing docs), apply_fixes (create template files). All local, no auth.

tools.name: score_repo
tools.description: Score a GitHub repository for investor readiness (0-100 scale). Returns three dimension scores, round-specific gap analysis, top fixes with score deltas, and missing checks.
tools.title: Score repository

tools.name: get_fix_plan
tools.description: Get a scaffold plan for missing investor-readiness docs. Returns the list of template files that would be created, which checks each fixes, and the score delta. Read-only.
tools.title: Get fix plan

tools.name: apply_fixes
tools.description: Create template files for missing investor-readiness docs. Generates scaffold templates. Use dryRun=true to preview without writing.
tools.title: Apply fixes (scaffold docs)
